metadata.name: KtulueKit-W11
metadata.author: Ktulue
metadata.description: Personal W11 software stack — declarative desired state installer

packages.name: PowerShell 7
packages.notes: Installing PS7 while running in PS can terminate the session. Run this tool from cmd.exe or Windows Terminal if possible.

packages.name: .NET 8 SDK
packages.notes: Install before Visual Studio. Can behave unpredictably if VS is installed simultaneously.

packages.name: Node.js LTS
packages.notes: Required by Claude Code (npm global). PATH refresh happens automatically before Tier 2 commands run.

packages.name: Visual Studio 2022 Community
packages.notes: Large install — extended timeout. May request reboot. Install .NET SDK first.

packages.name: Oh My Posh
packages.notes: Required by Nerd Fonts command in Tier 2.

packages.name: Notepad++
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Firefox
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: LibreOffice
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: SourceTree
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: VS Code
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Steam
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Discord
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Spotify
packages.notes: Already installed. Scope 'user' required — Spotify's installer fails under admin scope.

packages.name: OBS Studio
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Brave Browser
packages.notes: Already installed. Pre-check will skip or upgrade.

packages.name: Claude Desktop
packages.notes: Claude desktop app — includes Claude Cowork for background tasks.

packages.name: Pencil Desktop
packages.notes: Agent-driven MCP design canvas that lives in your codebase. Design on canvas, land in code. From pencil.dev.

commands.name: Claude Code
commands.notes: Requires Node.js. npm must be on PATH.

commands.name: Nerd Fonts (CaskaydiaCove)
commands.notes: Requires Oh My Posh to be installed and on PATH.

commands.name: WSL2 (Ubuntu)
commands.notes: Requires a reboot before WSL2 is usable. Tool will prompt after this step.

commands.name: DragonRuby GTK
commands.notes: Lifetime license via itch.io. Tool opens your itch.io library — download and install DragonRuby GTK manually from there.

commands.name: MeshMixer
commands.notes: Direct download. Tool opens the download page.

commands.name: Aseprite
commands.notes: One-time purchase or compile from source. Tool opens the site.

commands.name: Plexamp
commands.notes: Direct download from plex.tv.

commands.name: Hype Control
commands.notes: Not yet on Chrome Web Store. Opens GitHub repo — load as unpacked extension manually. Move to extensions[] with store ID once published.

commands.name: Claude Ruby Marketplace
commands.notes: Opens GitHub repo for review and manual install.

commands.name: Peon Ping
commands.command: git clone https://github.com/PeonPing/peon-ping && cd peon-ping && bash install.sh
commands.on_failure_prompt:
1. Open an admin PowerShell window
2. Run: git clone https://github.com/PeonPing/peon-ping
3. Run: cd peon-ping
4. Run: bash install.sh (or bash peon.sh if install.sh is not found)
5. Follow any prompts in the installer
6. Verify the install completed before pressing Enter.
commands.notes: Requires Python and Git. Clones repo and runs install.sh via bash. Falls back to manual guidance if it fails.

commands.name: DragonRuby Control
commands.notes: Opens GitHub repo for review and manual install.

commands.name: Elgato Stream Deck
commands.command: echo Already installed — no automated installer
commands.notes: Elgato Stream Deck software. Tracks desired state in summary only. Download: https://www.elgato.com/downloads

commands.name: Streamer.bot
commands.command: echo Already installed — no automated installer
commands.notes: Streamer.bot automation software. Tracks desired state in summary only. Download: https://streamer.bot

commands.name: DaVinci Resolve
commands.command: echo Already installed — no automated installer
commands.notes: Blackmagic DaVinci Resolve. Tracks desired state in summary only. Download: https://www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/davinciresolve

commands.name: Git: core.editor
commands.notes: Sets VS Code as the default git editor for commit messages and interactive rebase.

commands.name: Git: credential.helper
commands.notes: Enables Git Credential Manager to store credentials securely.

commands.name: PowerShell Profile: Oh My Posh
commands.check: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path $PROFILE) { if (Select-String 'oh-my-posh' $PROFILE -Quiet) { exit 0 } else { exit 1 } } else { exit 1 }"
commands.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "if (!(Test-Path $PROFILE)) { New-Item -Path $PROFILE -Type File -Force }; if (!(Select-String 'oh-my-posh' $PROFILE -Quiet -EA SilentlyContinue)) { Add-Content $PROFILE 'oh-my-posh init pwsh | Invoke-Expression' }"
commands.notes: Appends 'oh-my-posh init pwsh | Invoke-Expression' to the PS7 $PROFILE. Idempotent — skips if already present.

commands.name: Windows Terminal: CaskaydiaCove Font
commands.notes: Sets CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font as the default in Windows Terminal (Store version). Required for Oh My Posh glyphs to render correctly.

commands.name: npm: TypeScript
commands.notes: Global TypeScript compiler.

commands.name: npm: Prettier
commands.notes: Global Prettier code formatter.

commands.name: pip: pipx
commands.command: python -m pip install --user pipx && python -m pipx ensurepath
commands.notes: Installs pipx for isolated Python CLI tool environments.

commands.name: pip: black
commands.notes: Python code formatter via pipx.

commands.name: pip: ruff
commands.notes: Fast Python linter via pipx.

commands.name: VS Code: Go
commands.notes: Official Go extension (syntax, debugging, go tools).

commands.name: VS Code: Python
commands.notes: Official Python extension (IntelliSense, debugging, linting).

commands.name: VS Code: ESLint
commands.notes: ESLint integration for VS Code.

commands.name: VS Code: Prettier
commands.notes: Prettier formatter integration for VS Code.

commands.name: VS Code: GitLens
commands.notes: Git blame, history, and visualization supercharged.

commands.name: VS Code: C#
commands.notes: Official C# extension. Complements .NET 8 SDK and VS 2022.

commands.name: Windows: Show File Extensions
commands.notes: Disables hiding known file extensions in Explorer.

commands.name: Windows: Show Hidden Files
commands.notes: Enables showing hidden files and folders in Explorer.

commands.name: Windows: Developer Mode
commands.notes: Enables Developer Mode. Required for symlinks without admin, sideloading apps. Requires running as admin.

commands.name: Windows: Dark Mode
commands.command: reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Themes\Personalize" /v AppsUseLightTheme /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f && reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Themes\Personalize" /v SystemUsesLightTheme /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
commands.notes: Enables dark mode for both apps and system UI.
